untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-day pattern recognition (NR4: detecting that 4th day range is smaller than all preceding 3 days), dynamic stop placement at specific tick offsets relative to pattern highs/lows, position reversal logic on intraday price crossing, and trailing stop implementation. The allowed indicators lack multi-bar lookback arrays and pattern detection capabilities. NR4 pattern detection requires comparing current bar range against three prior bars simultaneously, which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator comparisons. Tick-based entry offsets and trailing stop mechanics are also not representable in the allowed operator set.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated intraday pattern signal requiring: (1) NR4 pattern detection across 4 bars, (2) conditional stop orders with tick offsets, (3) intraday reversal logic, and (4) trailing stop implementation. The backtest engine as specified does not support multi-bar lookback comparisons, dynamic stop order placement, or intraday reversal mechanics. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic external to the standard indicator framework.
